content.problemStatement:
- You have learned the basics of a Version Control System (VCS)
- Even though we didn’t use the term earlier, everything you learned falls under a category called: Version Control System
- **Version Control System**, a system that tracks changes in your files and lets you go back to previous versions whenever needed.
- **Git** is one of the most powerful and widely used version control systems in the world.

---

**What Next?**

- Now that you understand how Git works internally, next you will learn Git commands and workflow, including:
   - Tracking files
   - Staging changes
   - Committing changes
   - Viewing history
- In the next lessons, you’ll start using Git practically to manage real project versions.
